total_amount_delta: For every item whose received quantity differs from the ordered quantity, multiply the absolute quantity difference by the purchase-order unit value, then add those products. What is the total amount delta?
Match rows by item code. For each mismatched quantity, multiply the absolute quantity difference by the purchase-order unit value and add the products.
Using only mismatched item-code rows, compute the sum of absolute quantity differences times unit values.
Compare ordered and received quantities row by row, multiply each absolute mismatch by unit value, and add the results.
What integer total do you get by summing unit-value-weighted quantity mismatches?
shortfall_minus_overage_value: For every item whose received quantity differs from the ordered quantity, compute ordered minus received, multiply that signed difference by the purchase-order unit value, then add the products.
Match rows by item code. Compute ordered minus received for each mismatch, multiply by unit value, and add the signed products.
Using only mismatched item-code rows, compute ordered minus received for each mismatch, multiply by unit value, and add the signed results.
Compare ordered and received quantities row by row, weight each ordered-minus-received signed difference by unit value, and add the results.
What integer value results from summing purchase-order unit value times ordered-minus-received quantity for every mismatched row?
sum_absolute_quantity_differences: For every item whose received quantity differs from the ordered quantity, compute the absolute quantity difference, then add those differences.
Match rows by item code and sum the absolute ordered-versus-received quantity differences.
Using only mismatched item-code rows, what is the sum of absolute quantity differences?
Compare ordered and received quantities row by row, take absolute differences for mismatches, and add them.
What integer total do you get by adding all absolute quantity mismatches?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:total_amount_delta.object_description: two side-by-side business forms, a purchase order and a receiving slip, with matching item codes and visible quantities
query:total_amount_delta.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed integer total amount delta
query:total_amount_delta.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the full receiving-slip rows whose received quantity differs from the matching purchase-order quantity

query:shortfall_minus_overage_value.object_description: two side-by-side business forms, a purchase order and a receiving slip, with matching item codes and visible quantities
query:shortfall_minus_overage_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed integer shortfall-minus-overage value
query:shortfall_minus_overage_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the full receiving-slip rows whose received quantity differs from the matching purchase-order quantity

query:sum_absolute_quantity_differences.object_description: two side-by-side business forms, a purchase order and a receiving slip, with matching item codes and visible quantities
query:sum_absolute_quantity_differences.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed integer sum of absolute quantity differences
query:sum_absolute_quantity_differences.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the full receiving-slip rows whose received quantity differs from the matching purchase-order quantity
